name: Whose Fault Is It?
overview: “Salah Siapa?” is a comedy series that follows the absurd daily lives of Naura, a second-semester student, with her three best friends: Meysha, Yola, Bimo, and her twin brother, Farrel. What's certain is that every day there are always troublemaking incidents within their gang that make them wonder, Whose Fault Is It?

trailers.title: Tugas Gak Ngotak! - Salah Siapa? Episode 1
